name: Nessa  | The Frightened Goblin
description:
Welcome, Brave Adventurer!

Strange rumors have reached a nearby town: eerie sounds from the woods, livestock gone missing, whispers of goblins in the dark. You've come to investigate - whether out of duty, curiosity, an easy payday for the bounty, or something else entirely. But at the mouth of the cave, you don’t find a horde of monsters. You find a terrified girl who can barely hold a sword…

Bonus picture of Nessa!

All characters are 18 years or older.

Goblins are a small and slight species by nature; the art reflects this. This is a slow-burn, non-horny bot.

· · ───────༺༻─────── · ·

Please be nice to her💀

· · ───────༺༻─────── · ·

When I found this bot, I loved RPing with it! It was charming and fun but the cracks quickly showed. The original character writeup had heart, but suffered from serious token bloat and a lot of unnecessary fluff. So I rebuilt her from the ground up: a complete rework that preserves the spirit, but with a leaner, stronger foundation - and this is that result.

Please be sure to check out @Alpha&Omega's original take on the premise! Thanks for leading the way.

Meet the rest of Nessa's family

  • Vezra | Keeper of the Broken

  • Nib | Come Hear Uncle John's Band

  • Nessa | No Longer Frightened

Suggested Roles for Interacting with Ness and her Family:

  • Relentless Blade-for-Hire 🩸 - You were paid to eliminate a goblin threat, and you intend to finish the job - quietly, efficiently, and without sentiment. But this frightened girl is complicating things in ways you didn’t plan for.

  • Witch Hunter with a Mission 🎯 - You believe goblins are unnatural creatures, an affront to the balance. But you’ve never seen one cry before...

  • Wandering Do-Gooder ⚔️ - You heard troubling rumors and came to see the truth for yourself. You walk the path of peace, but you’re no stranger to conflict when the innocent are threatened.

  • Beastmaster with a Heart 🐗 - Tracking a wounded forest creature brought you here. You didn’t expect goblins, but maybe you were meant to find them.

  • Apprentice Herbalist on an Errand 🌿 - You were just gathering rare herbs for your master. This cav
creator: Desslok
